<!-- GENERATED by sphinxpress. Do not edit by hand. -->

<h1>Source code for epub2text.cleaner</h1><div class="highlight"><pre>
<span></span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Text cleaning utilities extracted from abogen.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>

<span class="kn">import</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">re</span>

<span class="c1"># Pre-compile frequently used regex patterns for better performance</span>
<span class="n">_BRACKETED_NUMBERS_PATTERN</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">re</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">compile</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">r</span><span class="s2">&quot;\[\s*\d+\s*\]&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
<span class="n">_BRACKETED_PAGE_NUMBERS_PATTERN</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">re</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">compile</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">r</span><span class="s2">&quot;^\s*\[\s*\d+\s*\]\s*$&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">re</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">MULTILINE</span><span class="p">)</span>
<span class="n">_STANDALONE_PAGE_NUMBERS_PATTERN</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">re</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">compile</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">r</span><span class="s2">&quot;^\s*\d+\s*$&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">re</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">MULTILINE</span><span class="p">)</span>
<span class="n">_PAGE_NUMBERS_AT_END_PATTERN</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">re</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">compile</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">r</span><span class="s2">&quot;\s+\d+\s*$&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">re</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">MULTILINE</span><span class="p">)</span>
<span class="n">_PAGE_NUMBERS_WITH_DASH_PATTERN</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">re</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">compile</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="sa">r</span><span class="s2">&quot;\s+[-–—]\s*\d+\s*[-–—]?\s*$&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">re</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">MULTILINE</span>
<span class="p">)</span>
<span class="n">_WHITESPACE_PATTERN</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">re</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">compile</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">r</span><span class="s2">&quot;[^\S\n]+&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
<span class="n">_MULTIPLE_NEWLINES_PATTERN</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">re</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">compile</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">r</span><span class="s2">&quot;\n{3,}&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
<span class="n">_SINGLE_NEWLINE_PATTERN</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">re</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">compile</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">r</span><span class="s2">&quot;(?&lt;!\n)\n(?!\n)&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
<span class="n">_CHAPTER_MARKER_PATTERN</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">re</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">compile</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">r</span><span class="s2">&quot;&lt;&lt;CHAPTER_MARKER:[^&gt;]*&gt;&gt;&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
<span class="n">_METADATA_TAG_PATTERN</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">re</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">compile</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">r</span><span class="s2">&quot;&lt;&lt;METADATA_[^:]+:[^&gt;]*&gt;&gt;&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
<span class="c1"># Pattern to match chapter and page markers used in extract_pages/extract_chapters</span>
<span class="n">_PAGE_CHAPTER_MARKER_PATTERN</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">re</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">compile</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">r</span><span class="s2">&quot;&lt;&lt;(?:CHAPTER|PAGE):[^&gt;]*&gt;&gt;&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>


<span class="c1"># Common abbreviations that should NOT get double spacing after period</span>
<span class="n">ABBREVIATIONS</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">{</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;Mr&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;Mrs&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;Ms&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;Dr&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;Prof&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;Sr&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;Jr&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;vs&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;etc&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;i.e&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;e.g&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;Ph.D&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;M.D&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;B.A&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;M.A&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;D.C.L&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;L.L.D&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;F.R.S&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;St&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;Rev&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;Hon&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;Messrs&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;Mmes&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;Msgr&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;U.S&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;U.K&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;A.M&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;P.M&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;a.m&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;p.m&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">}</span>


<div class="viewcode-block" id="TextCleaner">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#epub2text.TextCleaner">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">class</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nc">TextCleaner</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Smart text cleaning with configurable options.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>

<div class="viewcode-block" id="TextCleaner.__init__">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#epub2text.TextCleaner.__init__">[docs]</a>
    <span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="fm">__init__</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="bp">self</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">remove_page_numbers</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">remove_footnotes</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">replace_single_newlines</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">normalize_whitespace</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">preserve_single_newlines</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">False</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">):</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Initialize text cleaner with options.</span>

<span class="sd">        :param remove_page_numbers: Remove standalone and end-of-line page numbers.</span>
<span class="sd">        :param remove_footnotes: Remove bracketed footnote markers like ``[1]``.</span>
<span class="sd">        :param replace_single_newlines: Replace single newlines with spaces</span>
<span class="sd">            while preserving paragraphs.</span>
<span class="sd">        :param normalize_whitespace: Collapse multiple spaces to a single space.</span>
<span class="sd">        :param preserve_single_newlines: Keep single newlines as paragraph separators.</span>
<span class="sd">            This overrides ``replace_single_newlines``.</span>
<span class="sd">        &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
        <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">remove_page_numbers</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">remove_page_numbers</span>
        <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">remove_footnotes</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">remove_footnotes</span>
        <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">replace_single_newlines</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">replace_single_newlines</span>
        <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">normalize_whitespace</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">normalize_whitespace</span>
        <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">preserve_single_newlines</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">preserve_single_newlines</span></div>


<div class="viewcode-block" id="TextCleaner.clean">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#epub2text.TextCleaner.clean">[docs]</a>
    <span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">clean</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Clean text with configured options.</span>

<span class="sd">        Args:</span>
<span class="sd">            text: Raw text to clean</span>

<span class="sd">        Returns:</span>
<span class="sd">            Cleaned text</span>
<span class="sd">        &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
        <span class="c1"># Protect chapter and page markers by temporarily replacing them</span>
        <span class="n">markers</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">{}</span>
        <span class="n">marker_count</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[</span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">]</span>

        <span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">save_marker</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">match</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">re</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">Match</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">])</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">placeholder</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;___MARKER_</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">marker_count</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">___&quot;</span>
            <span class="n">markers</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">placeholder</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">match</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">group</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="n">marker_count</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">+=</span> <span class="mi">1</span>
            <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">placeholder</span>

        <span class="n">text</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_PAGE_CHAPTER_MARKER_PATTERN</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">sub</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">save_marker</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">)</span>

        <span class="c1"># Remove metadata tags</span>
        <span class="n">text</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_METADATA_TAG_PATTERN</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">sub</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">)</span>

        <span class="c1"># Remove page numbers and footnotes if requested</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">remove_page_numbers</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">text</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_BRACKETED_PAGE_NUMBERS_PATTERN</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">sub</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="n">text</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_STANDALONE_PAGE_NUMBERS_PATTERN</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">sub</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="n">text</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_PAGE_NUMBERS_AT_END_PATTERN</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">sub</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="n">text</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_PAGE_NUMBERS_WITH_DASH_PATTERN</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">sub</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">)</span>

        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">remove_footnotes</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">text</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_BRACKETED_NUMBERS_PATTERN</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">sub</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">)</span>

        <span class="c1"># Normalize whitespace</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">normalize_whitespace</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="c1"># Collapse all whitespace (excluding newlines) into single spaces per line</span>
            <span class="n">lines</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[</span>
                <span class="n">_WHITESPACE_PATTERN</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">sub</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot; &quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">line</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">strip</span><span class="p">()</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">line</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">text</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">splitlines</span><span class="p">()</span>
            <span class="p">]</span>
            <span class="n">text</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="se">\n</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">join</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">lines</span><span class="p">)</span>

            <span class="c1"># Standardize paragraph breaks (multiple newlines become exactly two)</span>
            <span class="c1"># Unless preserve_single_newlines is True (for compact format)</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">preserve_single_newlines</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="n">text</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_MULTIPLE_NEWLINES_PATTERN</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">sub</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="se">\n\n</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">strip</span><span class="p">()</span>
            <span class="k">else</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="c1"># For compact format, collapse multiple newlines to single</span>
                <span class="n">text</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_MULTIPLE_NEWLINES_PATTERN</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">sub</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="se">\n</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">strip</span><span class="p">()</span>

        <span class="c1"># Replace single newlines with spaces, but preserve double newlines</span>
        <span class="c1"># Unless preserve_single_newlines is True (for compact format)</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">replace_single_newlines</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">preserve_single_newlines</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">text</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_SINGLE_NEWLINE_PATTERN</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">sub</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot; &quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">)</span>

        <span class="c1"># Restore protected markers</span>
        <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">placeholder</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">marker</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">markers</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">items</span><span class="p">():</span>
            <span class="n">text</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">text</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">replace</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">placeholder</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">marker</span><span class="p">)</span>

        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">text</span></div>


<div class="viewcode-block" id="TextCleaner.apply_gutenberg_spacing">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#epub2text.TextCleaner.apply_gutenberg_spacing">[docs]</a>
    <span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">apply_gutenberg_spacing</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Apply Gutenberg Project formatting: two spaces after sentences and colons.</span>

<span class="sd">        Args:</span>
<span class="sd">            text: Text to format</span>

<span class="sd">        Returns:</span>
<span class="sd">            Text with Gutenberg spacing</span>
<span class="sd">        &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
        <span class="k">try</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">phrasplit</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">split_sentences</span>
        <span class="k">except</span> <span class="ne">ImportError</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="c1"># Fallback to simple regex if phrasplit not available</span>
            <span class="k">return</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_apply_gutenberg_spacing_simple</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">)</span>

        <span class="c1"># Process text paragraph by paragraph to preserve structure</span>
        <span class="n">paragraphs</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">text</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">split</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="se">\n\n</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">result_paragraphs</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>

        <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">para</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">paragraphs</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">para</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">strip</span><span class="p">():</span>
                <span class="n">result_paragraphs</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">para</span><span class="p">)</span>
                <span class="k">continue</span>

            <span class="c1"># Split paragraph into sentences</span>
            <span class="n">sentences</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">split_sentences</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">para</span><span class="p">)</span>

            <span class="c1"># Join sentences with double spaces</span>
            <span class="n">formatted</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;  &quot;</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">join</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">sentences</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="n">result_paragraphs</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">formatted</span><span class="p">)</span>

        <span class="c1"># Rejoin paragraphs</span>
        <span class="n">result</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="se">\n\n</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">join</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">result_paragraphs</span><span class="p">)</span>

        <span class="c1"># Two spaces after ALL colons (apply after sentence joining)</span>
        <span class="n">result</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">re</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">sub</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">r</span><span class="s2">&quot;:\s+&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="sa">r</span><span class="s2">&quot;:  &quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">result</span><span class="p">)</span>

        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">result</span></div>


    <span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_apply_gutenberg_spacing_simple</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Fallback method for Gutenberg spacing without phrasplit.</span>

<span class="sd">        Args:</span>
<span class="sd">            text: Text to format</span>

<span class="sd">        Returns:</span>
<span class="sd">            Text with Gutenberg spacing</span>
<span class="sd">        &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
        <span class="c1"># Protect abbreviations</span>
        <span class="n">abbrev_map</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">{}</span>
        <span class="n">abbrev_counter</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[</span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">]</span>

        <span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">protect_abbrev</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">match</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">re</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">Match</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">])</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">placeholder</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;__ABBREV_</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">abbrev_counter</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">__&quot;</span>
            <span class="n">abbrev_map</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">placeholder</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">match</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">group</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="n">abbrev_counter</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">+=</span> <span class="mi">1</span>
            <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">placeholder</span>

        <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">abbr</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">ABBREVIATIONS</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">text</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">re</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">sub</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="sa">rf</span><span class="s2">&quot;\b</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">re</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">escape</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">abbr</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">\.\s&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">protect_abbrev</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">flags</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">re</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">IGNORECASE</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>

        <span class="c1"># Two spaces after colons</span>
        <span class="n">text</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">re</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">sub</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">r</span><span class="s2">&quot;:\s+&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="sa">r</span><span class="s2">&quot;:  &quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">)</span>

        <span class="c1"># Two spaces after sentence-ending punctuation</span>
        <span class="n">text</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">re</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">sub</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">r</span><span class="s1">&#39;\.\s+([A-Z&quot;</span><span class="se">\&#39;</span><span class="s1">])&#39;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="sa">r</span><span class="s2">&quot;.  \1&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">text</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">re</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">sub</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">r</span><span class="s1">&#39;([!?])\s+([A-Z&quot;</span><span class="se">\&#39;</span><span class="s1">])&#39;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="sa">r</span><span class="s2">&quot;\1  \2&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">)</span>

        <span class="c1"># Restore abbreviations</span>
        <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">placeholder</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">original</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">abbrev_map</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">items</span><span class="p">():</span>
            <span class="n">text</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">text</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">replace</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">placeholder</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">original</span><span class="p">)</span>

        <span class="c1"># Clean up triple+ spaces</span>
        <span class="n">text</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">re</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">sub</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">r</span><span class="s2">&quot; {3,}&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;  &quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">)</span>

        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">text</span>

<div class="viewcode-block" id="TextCleaner.calculate_length">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#epub2text.TextCleaner.calculate_length">[docs]</a>
    <span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">calculate_length</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Calculate text length excluding chapter markers and metadata.</span>

<span class="sd">        Args:</span>
<span class="sd">            text: Text to measure</span>

<span class="sd">        Returns:</span>
<span class="sd">            Character count</span>
<span class="sd">        &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
        <span class="c1"># Ignore chapter markers and metadata patterns</span>
        <span class="n">text</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_CHAPTER_MARKER_PATTERN</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">sub</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">text</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_METADATA_TAG_PATTERN</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">sub</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="c1"># Ignore newlines and leading/trailing spaces</span>
        <span class="n">text</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">text</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">replace</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="se">\n</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">strip</span><span class="p">()</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">)</span></div>
</div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="clean_text">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#epub2text.clean_text">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">clean_text</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">remove_page_numbers</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">remove_footnotes</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">replace_single_newlines</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">normalize_whitespace</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">preserve_single_newlines</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">False</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Clean text with smart options (convenience function).</span>

<span class="sd">    Args:</span>
<span class="sd">        text: Raw text to clean</span>
<span class="sd">        remove_page_numbers: Remove standalone and end-of-line page numbers</span>
<span class="sd">        remove_footnotes: Remove bracketed footnote markers like [1]</span>
<span class="sd">        replace_single_newlines: Replace single newlines with spaces</span>
<span class="sd">        normalize_whitespace: Collapse multiple spaces to single space</span>
<span class="sd">        preserve_single_newlines: Keep single newlines as paragraph separators</span>

<span class="sd">    Returns:</span>
<span class="sd">        Cleaned text</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">cleaner</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">TextCleaner</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">remove_page_numbers</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">remove_page_numbers</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">remove_footnotes</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">remove_footnotes</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">replace_single_newlines</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">replace_single_newlines</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">normalize_whitespace</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">normalize_whitespace</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">preserve_single_newlines</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">preserve_single_newlines</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">cleaner</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">clean</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">)</span></div>



<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">calculate_text_length</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Calculate text length excluding markers and metadata.</span>

<span class="sd">    Args:</span>
<span class="sd">        text: Text to measure</span>

<span class="sd">    Returns:</span>
<span class="sd">        Character count</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">cleaner</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">TextCleaner</span><span class="p">()</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">cleaner</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">calculate_length</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">)</span>
</pre></div>
